diff:insert.comment: // Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0.
// (See accompanying file LICENSE_1_0.txt or copy at

/** * Event listener that internally counts and validates received events. * * Currently only performs validation by counting received events, rather * than performing full matching. This means that it won't fail if the *Ended * events are provided in wrong order, as long as they come in the right amount * and with the right nesting. */
